notes: The game runs well with some minor performance issues, the game seems like it's running a little slow but I haven't seen it run on windows so I'm not sure if it's steam play or the game. The sound has a few minor issues as well, sometimes the sound will get choppy but this only lasts for a few seconds. Other than that the sound works perfectly.
title: Warparty

notes: Runs fine out of the box but I have the feeling that some cinematics are missing: When I launch a campaign I see some Black Screen with "press a key to continue" and then the game start. I think there should be something but I couldn't check on a windows box.
title: WAR PARTY
